200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Magic Well - August 2024
Event Date: 18/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: T48


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Driller Chest
Ruby Sign Totem

When attacking a frozen unit, the totem owner tears through that unit's armor. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 200000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 20% for 5 sec. Also, that enemy takes 300000 physical damage over 5 sec.
Once in a while, the unit freezes the target of the attack for 3 sec. While frozen, it is unable to move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear abilities and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.

Requirements: 90
